skills.name: Plunder
skills.description: Accumulates across turns. On trigger deal dice damage and apply Weak for 1 turn.

skills.name: Backstep
skills.description: Absorb up to dice incoming damage. Vanishes start of next turn.

skills.name: Poison Mist
skills.description: Accumulates across turns. On trigger apply poison potency = dice for 2 turns to all heroes.
